apps.name: paus
apps.subtitle: An addiction-prevention app that helps users make conscious purchasing decisions by visualizing work hours required for items.
apps.description: paus helps people who struggle with unnecessary purchases by converting item prices into work hours, tracking spending and saving decisions, providing reminders for uncertain purchases, supporting multiple currencies and languages, and personalizing the experience based on financial goals.
apps.longDescription: paus helps people who struggle with unnecessary purchases by converting item prices into work hours, tracking spending and saving decisions, providing reminders for uncertain purchases, supporting multiple currencies and languages, and personalizing the experience based on financial goals.
features: Converting item prices into work hours
Personalizing the experience based on financial goals
